title: Unleash the power of monday AI in automations
excerpt:
Are you ready to unleash the power of AI in monday.com automations?
While you may have explored the monday AI we introduced last year, we’re excited to be taking AI capabilities even further with new AI automation enhanc…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you ready to unleash the power of AI in monday.com automations?

While you may have explored the monday AI we introduced last year, we’re excited to be taking AI capabilities even further with new AI automation enhancements. On April 10, join Or and Noa to uncover new features that you can use power up your automations.

CRM BIweekly forum1067×604 94.8 KB

posts.author: svitas (Susan Vitas)
posts.cookedHtml: Will the recording be made available from this meeting? Specifically I want to try out the AI automation that preps and sends out an email that they showed on a demo board. I didn’t get a screenshot of how they had the columns set up.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: You can find the recording on the FB community page. Here is the link - https://www.facebook.com/100083742554423/videos/7451712508208555/

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
@svitas @YashGarg I upload the recording to its own thread for you to watch and even ask question for the AI team directly on the thread.

Unleashing the power of AI in monday automations (recording) Community events
Are you ready to unleash the power of AI in automations? Uncover how you take AI capabilities even further with new AI automation enhancements. In this community session, monday AI product managers @OrFrid and @Noa_F will share new features that you can use power up your monday.com automations. Have any questions for the monday AI team? Ask below! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jt0WZJo0stM&feature=youtu.be Check our our community calendar to keep up to date with upcoming events! @ilanbu
